services.card_tagline: Choose from our 3 exclusive meeting rooms – where functionality meets inspiration and focus flows naturally.
services.meta_description: Exclusive meeting rooms for your team.

services.card_tagline: Host your corporate event in a private, nature-infused setting designed to inspire and impress.
Relax after a long day in one of our 8 versatile rooms – crafted for comfort, rest and a sense of ease.

one_price_concepts.headline: One Price Concept
one_price_concepts.body: No hidden fees or complex calculations. Our single price per person includes everything you need for a productive meeting.
one_price_concepts.inclusions_body: Exclusive room access, smart presentation technology, unlimited coffee & water, fresh fruits, dedicated host, and high-speed Wi-Fi.
one_price_concepts.catering_note: Optional high-end catering and lunch options available upon request.

one_price_concepts.headline: Simple & Transparent Pricing
one_price_concepts.body: Our room rates include everything you need for a comfortable stay. No hidden resort fees or surprise charges.
one_price_concepts.inclusions_body: Farm-fresh breakfast, daily housekeeping, high-speed Wi-Fi, premium toiletries, and free parking.
one_price_concepts.catering_note: Dinner reservations at our on-site restaurant can be made separately.
